package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerFrameworkPerformanceSqlxSelectSliceUnbounded() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_framework_performance_sqlx_select_slice_unbounded"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Framework-specific performance. Flag sqlx Select into slices without LIMIT or streaming for large tables."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
